items.name: Shearling Bomber Jacket and Denim Trucker Jacket
items.description: This lightweight bomber jacket is crafted with curly shearling and detailed throughout with full-grain leather piecing. Demonstrating our dedication to authenticity and time-honored traditions, this classic trucker jacket showcases premium denim that's built to endure while telling a story of timeless style. The metal buttons, custom-designed for Ralph Lauren, reflect our commitment to exceptional craftsmanship.

items.name: Builders Club
items.description:
Clean, sharp, and full of builder heritage — the White & Black Outrageous Builders Club Hard Hat brings vintage BC era flair with a crisp twist. With its clean white shell contrasted by bold black accents and the iconic oversized visor, it’s perfect for retro avatars, throwback construction roleplay, and collectors chasing golden-era Roblox gear.
